economic_notes: Noda Enterprises Ltd. (100% owned) operates gas pump, motel, and other rental properties. Council is economically dependent on ISC and GNWT funding. Ka'a'gee Tu Community Improvement Society is also consolidated.
notes: Province set to NT (Northwest Territories). Nation is located in Kakisa, NT. Noda Enterprises Ltd. is a 100% owned subsidiary accounted for using the modified equity method (GBE). Ka'a'gee Tu Community Improvement Society is also included in consolidation. Contributions repayable of $41,585 exists but no long-term bank debt. Deferred contributions of $9.46M represent the bulk of liabilities. OSR calculated as total revenue ($3,349,492) minus total government transfers per Note 13 ($3,348,020) = $1,472; however interest revenue ($162,550) and other revenue ($95,464) are likely non-government, so OSR approximated as $257,964 (interest + other revenue less equity loss adjustment). No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Expenses by program derived from income statement line items: infrastructure includes water/sewage ($316,182) and utilities ($55,112); social uses members assistance ($238,958). No housing or education expense lines explicitly labeled.
